## What does this PR do?
Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New cleanup step
- [ ] Improvement to an existing step
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested on Windows 10 or Windows 11
- [ ] `-DryRun` mode works correctly for this change
- [ ] Skipped gracefully when the target tool is not installed
- [ ] No hardcoded paths — uses auto-detection or `$Config_*` variables
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for functional changes)

## Notes
Any edge cases, limitations, or things reviewers should know.
